The Blind (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,265,487Details
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $933,529
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $267,640
Total $1,201,169
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Long before Phil Robertson was a reality TV star, he fell in love, started a family, and began to spiral out of control. The film shares never-before-revealed moments in Phil’s life as he seeks to conquer the shame of his past, ultimately finding redemption in an unlikely place.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,341,725 (25.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,715 opening theaters/1,715 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,875,248

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 28th, 2023 (Wide) by Fathom Events
International Releases: August 15th, 2024 (Limited) (Mexico)
Video Release: November 3rd, 2023 by Mill Creek Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic content and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2789 (cert #54446), 6/28/2023)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Geographical setting: Louisiana
Plot point: Addiction, The Past Catching up with You
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: GND Media Group, Fathom Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
